_publications._publicationTitle: Development of patient reported outcome measures assessing tumor pain intensity and tumor pain interference for individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 and plexiform neurofibromas: qualitative findings.

_contextSnippet: three themes were evident when talking with patients about how pNF-related pain interfered with daily life that were related to modifying the PII for individuals with NF1 and pNFs
details: Modified for individuals with NF1 and plexiform neurofibromas based on three themes: physical interference, physiological interference, and social-emotional interference
